2004February 29, 2004

🇺🇸 Fort Lauderdale, FL, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Fort Lauderdale, United States, February 29, 2004 -- March 5, 2004

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2004-03-ft-lauderdale-fl-usa

10 Resolutions

606Plenary
Extend timeline for Dictionaries Task Force draft report
SC 4 directs the Task Force to circulate a draft report to the SC 4 community by 2004-06-18 and to report to SC 4 at the next ISO/TC 184/SC 4 meeting in Bath, UK.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
605Plenary
Support IDW investigation of language usage with EXPRESS
SC 4 supports the proposed investigation by the Industrial Data on the Web Group (IDW) of the relationship between SC 4 standards and OASIS, W3C and OMG standards. Use of languages such as UML and ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
604Plenary
Propose Category A liaison with NATO AC/135 and nominate Steven Arnett
SC 4 proposes a Category A liaison with NATO AC/135, nominates Steven Arnett, US Defense Logistics Information Service, as the liaison officer, and requests that the SC 4 secretary confirms this li...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
603Plenary
Request ISO/CS to retain ISO 10303-203 ed1 in the catalogue
SC 4 requests the ISO Central Secretariat to retain the listing of ISO 10303-203 edition 1 in the ISO catalogue of available International Standards, after the publication of the ISO 10303-203 edit...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
602Plenary
Nominate liaison officers to IEC SC 65B/WG 10
SC 4 nominates Hiroshi Murayama as primary liaison officer, with Dr. Wolfgang Wilkes as alternate, to IEC SC 65B/WG 10 for a period of two years, and welcomes Dr. Jean-Philippe Herzog as liaison of...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
601Plenary
Reappoint Gerry Radack as Convener of WG 3
SC 4 appreciates and accepts the offer of Dr. Radack to serve as Convener of WG 3.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
600Plenary
Approve project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-0235 |Anna Moreno | |ISO 10303-1143 |Ricardo Goncalves ...

Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
